title: Palindrome Partitioning III
hints: Consider the cost to make any substring s[i..j] a palindrome. Precompute these costs for all pairs.
This is a dynamic programming problem. Let dp[i][k] be the min changes for s[0..i] split into k palindromes.
To compute dp[i][k], iterate over the last split point p. The cost is dp[p-1][k-1] plus the palindrome cost of s[p..i].
